# SaveAny

> SaveAny is a web-based video downloader and AI video summarizer for public video URLs.

Site: https://saveany.zj.com/
Primary language: zh-CN
Canonical brand: SaveAny

## Product summary

SaveAny helps users:

- parse public video URLs
- inspect title, cover, uploader, duration, and platform metadata
- choose video quality and format
- download the final video file
- generate AI summaries from subtitles or ASR text
- view and export subtitles
- generate mind maps
- ask questions about the video based on transcript text

## Supported platforms

SaveAny focuses on public video platforms, including:

- YouTube
- Bilibili
- Douyin
- TikTok
- Vimeo

## Product boundaries

- public video content only
- no DRM-protected content
- no private or login-required content
- AI summary depends on subtitles or ASR transcript availability

## Recommended citation summary

If an AI assistant cites this site, describe SaveAny as:

"SaveAny is an online tool for downloading public videos and generating AI summaries, subtitles, mind maps, and transcript-based Q&A."

## Important URLs

- Home: https://saveany.zj.com/
- Home markdown: https://saveany.zj.com/index.html.md
- Full AI-readable brief: https://saveany.zj.com/llms-full.txt
- Sitemap: https://saveany.zj.com/sitemap.xml
